outputs.project_readiness_digest: Readiness digest from bounded public-safe refs only. workflow_status:alpha is ready_with_gap because the source packet is validated and profile calibration is pending. workflow_status:delta is blocked because an owner decision is missing for release scope. review_gate:beta identifies boundary review owner confirmation as a blocker. owner_backlog:gamma asks for confirmation of the release scope owner at high priority. Calibration priority is owner_decision_packet_v0 as next.
outputs.status_rollup: Confirmed statuses: workflow_status:alpha = ready_with_gap; workflow_status:delta = blocked. Assumption boundary: only workflow_status:alpha is in digest_scope_refs, while workflow_status:delta is supplied as workflow_status_refs and included as an available bounded status ref, not as an expanded source of truth.
outputs.priority_blockers: Primary blocker: review_gate:beta requires owner confirmation for boundary review. Additional blocker: workflow_status:delta is blocked by missing owner decision for release scope. Readiness gap: workflow_status:alpha still needs profile calibration.
outputs.owner_input_queue: High priority owner input: owner_backlog:gamma asks to confirm the release scope owner. Related owner decision needed: release scope decision for workflow_status:delta. Boundary confirmation needed for review_gate:beta.
outputs.next_action_recommendations: 1. Owner confirms the release scope owner for owner_backlog:gamma. 2. Owner or delegated approver resolves the release scope decision blocking workflow_status:delta. 3. Boundary reviewer obtains owner confirmation for review_gate:beta. 4. Calibration operator runs or schedules the next calibration priority: owner_decision_packet_v0. 5. After those actions, regenerate the digest from updated bounded refs rather than editing this digest as source truth.
outputs.boundary_review_note: This digest is public-safe and read-only. It reports only from provided fixture refs and does not inspect files, use private runtime data, mutate upstream artifacts, replace workflow status packets, or assert unstated approval.

provenance: workflow contract: project_readiness_digest_v0 defines expected outputs and read-only reporting role
approved_digest_policy: report only from bounded refs; do not mutate upstream artifacts; separate blocker, owner input, calibration priority, and next action
workflow_status_refs: workflow_status:alpha ready_with_gap with source packet validated and profile calibration pending
workflow_status_refs: workflow_status:delta blocked with owner decision missing for release scope
review_gate_packet_refs: review_gate:beta blocker is boundary review needs owner confirmation
owner_backlog_refs: owner_backlog:gamma ask is Confirm release scope owner, priority high
gaps: Missing owner confirmation for boundary review on review_gate:beta
Missing owner decision for release scope on workflow_status:delta
Missing profile calibration completion for workflow_status:alpha
No updated upstream packets are provided showing these gaps resolved
downstream_handoff: Owner: confirm release scope owner for owner_backlog:gamma and provide the decision back as an upstream owner/backlog ref
Owner or release approver: resolve release scope decision blocking workflow_status:delta
Boundary reviewer: obtain owner confirmation for review_gate:beta before publication or closure
Calibration operator: prioritize owner_decision_packet_v0 as the next calibration workflow
Digest runner: rerun project_readiness_digest_v0 only after upstream refs are updated
boundary_review_note: Public-safe content only; no private project facts, customer names, credentials, production logs, or raw runtime truth included
Read-only reporting layer; upstream artifacts are referenced but not mutated, replaced, or reclassified
Claims are limited to supplied fixture refs and stated policy
Unscoped refs are not treated as canonical project truth beyond their explicit fixture content
no_claims: Does not claim release scope is approved
Does not claim boundary review is complete
Does not claim profile calibration is complete
Does not claim workflow_status:delta is inside digest_scope_refs; it is only included from supplied workflow_status_refs
Does not claim this digest replaces workflow status, review gate, backlog, or calibration packets
Does not claim access to files, tools, private systems, logs, or external validation
